$comment: Phase B config for the HDS monorepo TEST HARNESS. Phase B's real targets are downstream Ember consumer apps whose code still uses the pre-carbonization `--token-*` tokens; running it here against `main`-style usages validates the tool. Copy this file per target repo and edit only these values; never edit migrate-tokens.mjs. `prefix` is the PRE prefix to scan for (what `removed[].before` names carry). Note: `mapPath`/`reportDir` are resolved relative to THIS config file, hence the `../reports/` prefix (reports live in tooling/reports/, config in tooling/config/).
